claim: When an operator delegates a sub-domain, the sub-operator shall return only CONCLUSIONS with shared objects declared as an explicit border, never raw detail.
why: SETTLED (P8): the proposal protocol carries CONCLUSIONS (rationale + derived requirements) not raw context detail — the Proposed* types' narrow, typed API surface IS the contract (internal/proposal/types.go). The parent keeps the conclusion-as-proposal (internal/proposal Apply), not the file-dump of working context. Returning raw detail would re-import the sub-domain's whole context into the parent's budget, defeating the delegation. Implementation: internal/proposal (types.go ProposedRequirement/ProposedConflict/etc. + apply.go Apply/ApplyBatch).
